title: Postmaster DL Envelopes 110 x 220mm 80 GSM Self Seal White 400 Pack
features: DL ENVELOPE - Designed to take sheets of A4 Paper folded into thirds & designed to be sent using a single 1st Class or 2nd Class Stamp (max 100g)
KEEPS YOUR DOCUMENTS PRIVATE - our envelopes are printed on the inside with an opaque blue pattern that makes it difficult to see what is inside the envelope
PEFC-CERTIFIED FOR SUSTAINABILITY - PEFC is a European based Forest certification system, that allows small- and family forest owners to demonstrate their excellence in sustainable forest management
HYGIENIC & FAST - this envelope features Self Seal closing, which means no licking or peeling. Simply press the flap down for a secure, hassle free close

MADE IN THE UK - we manufacture millions of Envelopes for some of Britain's biggest Organisations as well as for thousands of small, home based businesses using quality, bright white 80GSM paper. The Paper can be written on, labelled or can be used with most household & office printers
